metadata.description: Semantic ontology for the cockpit personal agent platform monorepo

nodeTypes.description: The cockpit monorepo as a whole — single-user personal agent platform on Raspberry Pi
Top-level project within the system (cockpit-api or cockpit-app)
Single FastAPI application serving all frontend apps and the MCP server
Bounded module under src/services/ — groups router, service, repository, models
FastAPI APIRouter within a ServiceModule
Single HTTP route — method + path combination
Business logic layer (service.py) within a ServiceModule
Data access layer (repository.py) within a ServiceModule
SQLModel ORM class mapped to a PostgreSQL table
Named capability = Feature × Action (e.g. brain:read, redis_store:create). Composed from Feature + Action rows in DB.
Named role assigned to a user — Admin or User
A named capability domain (roles, users, redis_store, brain, vikunja). Rows in features table. Combined with Action to form Permissions.
CRUD verb (create, read, update, delete). Rows in actions table.
Routed view within a FrontendApp
Cookie-based session authentication mechanism used by frontend apps
OAuth2 authorization code flow used by MCP clients
Active user session consisting of access token + refresh token pair stored in DB
Redis key-value store used for MCP OAuth tokens and Vikunja token cache
FastMCP server mounted at /mcp in cockpit-api — exposes tools and resources to MCP clients
Individual callable function registered on MCPServer
Readable resource registered on MCPServer (brain notes)
External system that cockpit integrates with
Nx application (cockpit, login, cv, store) — each deployed as separate Docker container
Routed view within a FrontendApp
Reusable UI element within a FrontendApp or NxLib
Shared Nx library used across multiple frontend apps
OpenAPI-generated TypeScript types shared across all frontend apps via @cockpit-app/api-types
Docker container running on Raspberry Pi
GitHub Actions workflow for building, testing, or deploying
GitHub Container Registry where Docker images are pushed
Raspberry Pi host where all containers run
Project in Vikunja task management system
Task within a Vikunja project — has title, due date, priority, assignees, done status
Markdown note in the brain notes git repository — has type (context/reference/note), tags, aliases
Tailored CV variant stored in redis_store — has name and sections dict (summary, experience, skills, etc.)
Named section within a CVPreset (e.g. summary, experience, skills, education)
Account in Actual Budget — on-budget or off-budget tracking account
Financial transaction within a BudgetAccount — amount in integer cents

nodes.name: Admin
nodes.description: Full access — can manage users, roles, permissions. Auto-assigned all permissions on migration.

nodes.name: User
nodes.description: Standard access — can access features they have permissions for

nodes.name: brain_list_notes
nodes.description: List brain notes with optional filters

nodes.name: brain_list_folders
nodes.description: List all folders in brain notes directory

nodes.name: brain_create_note
nodes.description: Create brain note and git commit+push

nodes.name: brain_update_note
nodes.description: Update brain note and git commit+push

nodes.name: brain_delete_note
nodes.description: Delete brain note and git commit+push

nodes.name: actual_search_transactions
nodes.description: Search transactions by account and date range

nodes.name: actual_create_transaction
nodes.description: Create single transaction (amount in integer cents)

nodes.name: vikunja_get_tasks
nodes.description: Get tasks with filters (due date, done, search, sort)

nodes.name: vikunja_create_task
nodes.description: Create new task in Vikunja project

nodes.name: vikunja_update_task
nodes.description: Update task (done, due date, priority, title)

nodes.name: search_company
nodes.description: Web search for company culture, values, tech stack

nodes.name: get_cv_base_preset
nodes.description: Read all sections from base CV preset

nodes.name: preview_cv_preset
nodes.description: Preview tailored CV preset without saving

nodes.name: save_cv_preset
nodes.description: Save confirmed CV preset to redis_store

nodes.name: hermes_get_model
nodes.description: Get current default model for Hermes agent

nodes.name: hermes_set_model
nodes.description: Set default model for Hermes agent and restart it

nodes.name: brain_notes
nodes.description: Brain notes readable as MCP resources

nodes.name: login
nodes.purpose: Authentication UI — login form and password change

nodes.name: cockpit
nodes.purpose: Personal dashboard — task overview and app links hub

nodes.name: cv
nodes.purpose: CV editor and preset manager — create and tailor CV variants

nodes.name: store
nodes.purpose: Redis key-value store browser — inspect and manage stored data
